description_long: This object is a stylized hot dog featuring a smooth, elongated sausage encased in a soft, golden-brown bun. The bun is marked with three evenly spaced diagonal slits on its upper surface, revealing a lighter interior beneath the crust. The sausage is fully enclosed by the bun, with no visible condiments or toppings present. The surface of the bun appears matte and slightly textured, suggesting a freshly baked quality. The overall shape is gently curved, with rounded ends and a uniform thickness throughout. There are no visible grill marks, packaging, or additional elements attached to the hot dog.
description: A smooth, golden-brown hot dog in a bun with three diagonal slits and no visible condiments or packaging.
description_view_0: The hot dog is seen from an angle highlighting the rounded left end and the three diagonal slits on the bun's top.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the right end of the hot dog and the curvature of the bun, with all three slits visible.
description_view_2: The hot dog is shown from a slightly higher angle, displaying the full length and the slits more centrally.
description_view_3: The right side of the hot dog is more prominent, with the slits and bun curvature clearly visible.
